nl_query: Which configurations at course scope override the global scope setting for the same configuration key, and show the course code, global value, course value, and the data type.
failed_sql: SELECT c.id, c.config_key, c.config_value, c.data_type, au.code, g.config_value AS global_value, au.config_value AS academic_unit_value FROM configuration c JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = c.scope_id AND c.scope_type = 'COURSE' JOIN configuration g ON g.config_key = c.config_key AND g.scope_type = 'GLOBAL' WHERE g.scope_id IS NULL AND c.scope_id IS NOT NULL AND c.data_type = g.data_type ORDER BY c.config_key
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: academic_unit does NOT have config_value. Configuration values are stored in the configuration table.
